datasheet_target.scope_note: 公开数据表仅作电学目标；本模型不是专有芯片结构的复制。

gate_contact.source_evidence: Sentaurus W-2024.09 Power/IGBT_TrenchFieldStop applies Barrier=-0.50 to the gate electrode; required to preserve the seed contact work-function semantics

candidate_freeze.scope_note: 静态门与 IGBT refined-mesh 一致性指标均通过；这仍只是参考模型，不表示专有商用芯片结构复现。MOSFET refined-v2-local 三级趋势也已闭合。六份既有 TDR 已完成关断场复核，轨迹按 500 V ImpactIonization 敏感标记冻结且不是 seed track；HeavyIon 仍须由精确哈希绑定的独立证据显式授权。

drift_thickness.source_evidence: attempt15 passed the rated-voltage BV gate: current was 8.277e-7 A/um at 650.3 V and reached the 1e-6 A/um criterion at 662.3 V; retain 74 um pending Vth, conduction, leakage, and refined-mesh gates

drift_donor_concentration.source_evidence: 650 V reference-model assumption; to calibrate against BV

gate_oxide_thickness.source_evidence: 0.08 um reference-model assumption; attempt16 wires this existing DSL value into SDE after audit found the prior polygon hardcoded to a nonuniform ~0.02-0.09 um envelope

body_implant_y_start.source_evidence: attempt17 aligns the P-body surface implant start with the corrected 0.08 um oxide outer edge at y=2.88 um; attempt16 doping audit measured only ~1.1e16 cm^-3 net acceptor at y=2.9 um because the previous y=3.0 start covered the channel only by its lateral Gaussian tail

body_peak_acceptor_concentration.source_evidence: attempts18-20 were rejected: increasing P-body peak shifted the raw transfer curve but collapsed datasheet-point on-state current and drove AreaFactor from 54.2 m to 1.23 km. Restore 1.5e17 cm^-3 and tune Vth with orthogonal interface charge.

interface_fixed_charge_concentration.source_evidence: first-order Cox estimate for the corrected 0.08 um oxide: negative fixed charge should shift the body-aligned Vth from 1.94 V toward the 6 V typical target without deepening the P-body; syntax follows the Sentaurus TrenchGateNMOS_Ron_BV interface contract

body_implant_y_end.source_evidence: candidate 4.6 um rejected: IGBT BV current criterion moved from 163.19 V to 31.56 V in run IGBT650_BV__candidate_attempt09_body_implant_y_end_4p6__20260715T153223999Z__bdbd553f

gate_corner_radius.source_evidence: 0.3 um attempt12 was rejected because it left the criterion effectively unchanged at 530.97 V; retain the 0.2 um attempt11 parent for the next single-variable thickness test

body_implant_depth.source_evidence: 5.65 um learned-reference depth raised the physical 1e-6 A/um criterion from 169.63 V to 530.98 V in run IGBT650_BV__candidate_attempt11_body_implant_depth_5p65__20260715T160655130Z__397fe4aa; still below the 650 V gate

minority_carrier_lifetime.source_evidence: 300 us candidate is bound to the successful baseline run set: BV 707.497688 V, Vth 6.448419 V, VCEsat 1.55 V, and 650 V leakage 1.9422196e-5 A. Refined mesh retained all four static gates and met every IGBT mesh-consistency threshold; the combined campaign remains blocked by MOSFET mesh Vth and explicit HeavyIon authorization.

track_x.source_evidence: 500 V verified-mesh ImpactIonization localization; start is 0.01 um beyond the x=3.21 um Si/Oxide tip. Evidence: field_track_localization_v2.json SHA-256 880ca5633509b92ab662c5c603202807dc89df1f631c832022981b2133a12e7e

track_y.source_evidence: 500 V ImpactIonization maximum y coordinate on run IGBT650_FIELD_V500__checkpoint_b_field_localization_v1__20260716T032753086Z__e4556c29; seed track was not reused

track_length.source_evidence: strict-interior depth path from x=3.22 to x=73.99 um on the 74 um verified refined mesh

track_direction.source_evidence: device-depth direction aligned with the strict-interior Silicon path and verified field cutline; replaces the geometry-invalid seed direction

mesh_consistency_contract.comparison: same frozen physical candidate and identical static decks/parameters; only SDE mesh controls change
mesh_consistency_contract.area_factor_policy: use baseline AreaFactor unchanged for refined Vth, conduction, and 650 V leakage comparisons; refined self-calibrated AreaFactor is diagnostic only
mesh_consistency_contract.bv_policy: first raw high-terminal InnerVoltage sample whose absolute eCurrent+hCurrent reaches 1e-6 A/um; solver failure is never BV
pass_requirements: all refined datasheet static gates pass
all four baseline/refined deltas are within threshold
all eight refined runs are successful leased one-thread SDevice runs
each device run set binds one immutable refined mesh hash
mesh_consistency_contract.rationale: BV uses a 2% discretization bound; Vth uses a 0.1 V absolute bound; conduction allows 5%; leakage allows 10% because it is a sub-pA/um interpolated quantity. Missing or non-finite evidence fails closed.

static_gates.bv_criterion: I(high terminal) >= 1e-6 A/um during monotonic off-state ramp; first raw high-terminal InnerVoltage sample
